title: SessionPlanTutoringProfile
description: Tutoring session plan per Irby (2018): topic-specific, problem-focused, short-term. Focused on improvement in a specific skill or concept.

specific_topic.description: The precise topic being tutored (e.g., 'Riverpod providers: autoDispose vs keepAlive')

diagnostic_result.description: What the tutor identified as the specific gap/confusion

success_criterion.description: Concrete measurable outcome (e.g., 'Solves 3 exercises without asking + passes quiz')
